headline: First National Realty Partners Expands Cleveland MSA Portfolio with Marc's Grocery Center
summary: First National Realty Partners (FNRP), a leading national private equity commercial real estate firm, announced the acquisition of Marc's Grocery Center, a 63,317-square-foot, grocery-anchored retail center in South Euclid, Ohio.

headline: Starbucks Gets Downgraded While Brinker and Wingstop Earn Bullish Analyst Calls
summary: Wolfe Research analyst Greg Badishkanian issued a split verdict on the restaurant sector this week, downgrading Starbucks to Peer Perform from Outperform while simultaneously upgrading Brinker International and initiating Wingstop with Outperform ratings. The divergence draws a sharp line between a turnaround story still under scrutiny and two concepts Wolfe views as structurally positioned to ... headline: Starbucks downgraded at Wolfe Research as execution risk remains high
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research downgraded Starbucks to Peer Perform from Outperform in a note on Monday, warning that the company is only at the “early stages of a multi-year turnaround” and that execution risk remains high.

headline: Starbucks’ New Nashville Supply Chain Hub Could Be A Game Changer For Starbucks (SBUX)
summary: In early March 2026, Starbucks announced plans to open a new corporate office in Nashville to anchor its North American supply chain operations, relocating some roles from Seattle and adding new jobs as part of its "Back to Starbucks" turnaround plan. This move signals a push to improve operational efficiency and support growth in the Southeastern U.S., reinforcing management’s focus on execution alongside early signs of recovering U.S. customer traffic. Now we’ll explore how Starbucks’ new...

headline: Starbucks Balances Nashville Supply Chain Push With Sugar Backlash Questions
summary: Starbucks, NasdaqGS:SBUX, is opening a new supply chain focused corporate office in Nashville, offering some Seattle based staff relocation options and planning to add local roles. The company is also facing public criticism from a government health official over the sugar content of its drinks, just as it rolls out new seasonal beverages. For investors tracking Starbucks at a share price of $98.99, these developments touch both its operations and its brand. The new Nashville hub signals a...
